description_long: This clock tower is a tall, ornate wooden structure featuring intricate carvings and decorative finials on its roof. The tower is rectangular in shape, with a prominent arched opening on the front, flanked by two columns and topped with a triangular pediment. The roof is adorned with multiple spire-like finials, including a central domed spire and smaller side spires, giving it a grand and traditional appearance. The woodwork is detailed, with ornamental motifs and moldings visible along the edges and corners. The base of the tower is solid and slightly wider, providing stability, and the entire structure is finished in a rich, dark brown wood tone. No visible clock face or mechanical elements are present on the exterior.
description: A tall, ornately carved wooden clock tower with spire-like finials and a grand arched opening, finished in dark brown wood. No visible clock face is present.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the tower, the decorative finials on top, and the solid wooden construction.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat back panel, symmetrical finials, and the absence of any openings or clock faces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with visible finials and detailed woodwork along the side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the arched opening, two columns, ornate pediment, and the most decorative elements of the tower.
attribute_tower_roof_type: multi-spired with central dome and finials
